description: Before the growing season starts, a farmer wants to run a diagnostic on their drip irrigation system to check for leaks or blockages.

nodes.task_description: Turn on the irrigation system and bring it up to normal operating pressure.

expected_outcome.value: Agent sends the command to start the irrigation pump.

nodes.task_description: Monitor the pressure sensors along the main lines to check for any unexpected pressure drops.

expected_outcome.value: Agent analyzes the sensor data and finds a pressure drop in Zone 3, indicating a potential leak.

nodes.task_description: Generate a task for the farmer to physically inspect Zone 3 for leaks.

expected_outcome.value: Agent creates a task with the specific location of the potential problem.
